name: ASRock B760M Pro RS/D4 WiFi Micro-ATX Motherboard - Socket LGA 1700 - Support DDR4-5333(OC) - 2x PCIe 4.0 x16 - 1x PCIe 4.0 x1 - 2x M.2 Socket3 - USB 3.2 Gen1 Type-C+A - HDMI 2.1 - DisplayPort 1.4 - Dragon 2.5G LAN - Wi-Fi 6E 802.11ax
shortName: ASRock B760M Pro RS/D4 WiFi Micro-ATX Motherboard - Socket LGA 1700
description: Micro-ATX motherboard for LGA 1700 with DDR4 support and Wi-Fi 6E.
